title: Family Reunification for Dependent Relatives - Spain
title_local: Reagrupacion Familiar - Residencia por reagrupacion familiar
summary: Legal residents in Spain may bring eligible family members, including dependent parents under conditions, through the family reunification process.
steps: Sponsor in Spain must usually have held a residence permit for at least one year and have renewed status.
Submit family reunification application (EX-02 form) at the Oficina de Extranjeria.
Provide proof of sufficient financial means and accommodation.
Provide relationship documents and dependency proof where relevant.
Wait for resolution from the immigration office.
If approved, relative applies for the corresponding visa at the Spanish consulate.
Relative travels to Spain within visa validity.
Apply for TIE card within required legal window.
documents: Civil status and relationship documents (apostilled and translated where required)
office: Oficina de Extranjeria in Spain, then Spanish consulate abroad, and police office for TIE.
fee: About EUR16.60 for application; TIE card fee varies by province and year
notes: For dependent parents, dependency evidence is highly scrutinized and requirements can vary by province.
